reference: Hi dear, I understand your concern. There are different causes of fever: one. Infection - perform stool culture and test stool for cysts and ova. two. Urinary tract infection - do a urine analysis. three. Viral infection.
text: Hi, dear. I understand your concern. There are different causes of fever. One, infection, performed stool culture and test stool persists in OVA. Two, retracted infection, do a urine analysis. Three, viral infection.
